name: smartrecruiters-example
description: SmartRecruiters URL routes to tier-2 adapter against api.smartrecruiters.com.

companyDescription.text: Bosch is a global supplier of technology and services, active in the areas of Mobility, Industrial Technology, Consumer Goods, and Energy and Building Technology.

jobDescription.text:
You will architect low-latency perception-stack software running on our autonomous-driving platform, collaborating with hardware, simulation, and safety teams across four continents.

  • Design perception fusion algorithms in C++17
  • Own latency, throughput, and safety requirements end-to-end
  • Drive adoption of automated testing and CI/CD

qualifications.text:
• 8+ years of embedded or real-time systems experience
  • Mastery of modern C++ and deterministic systems
  • Exposure to AUTOSAR, ROS, or similar automotive stacks

additionalInformation.text: Relocation assistance available. Bosch is an equal-opportunity employer.
